summary: Created executive_proposal.md at ~/code/cirrus/ — concise implementation proposal for leadership based on refactor_proposal.md audit findings. 3-phase plan: Phase 0 (security, 29h, 1-2wk), Phase 1 (MVP gaps, 84h, 2-3wk), Phase 2 (scale/polish, 350-392h, 6-10wk). Total 463-505h / 10-15 weeks. Includes pessimist view (4-5 months) and optimist view (3-3.5 months). 3 blocking product questions for Mason. Recommendation: start Phase 0 immediately, answer product questions this week, commit to Phase 0+1 as a unit. Also fixed 7 codex round-2 findings and pinged codex on AgentBridge for final sign-off (still pending).
